challenge.title: Korak 5
challenge.description: Sada, treba da proverite da li je kandidat kvalifikovan samo za kredit za automobil. Ako jeste, vratite string "You qualify for a car loan.".

challengeFiles.name: script

tests.text: Your getLoanMessage function should return a string if the applicant qualifies for a car loan.
Your getLoanMessage function should return the string "You qualify for a car loan.".
tests.testString: assert.strictEqual(getLoanMessage(30000, 650), "You qualify for a car loan.");

tests.text: Your getLoanMessage function should return undefined if the applicant's annual income and credit score do not meet the requirements for a car loan.

challengeFiles.name: script
